era: Blues Rock. E=6 -- FIRST BLUES ROCK (Genre Stage 107). Sibling duo. Blues through punk lens. Rainier Valley. Sub Pop. v1.49.347.

location.formative: Rainier Valley: south Seattle's diverse heart. Black cultural tradition, punk energy, indie aesthetics.
location.career: The Black Tones. 2013-present. Sub Pop. First Blues Rock.

members.name: Eva Walker
members.note: Blues bends through punk distortion. Raw, powerful vocals. Songwriter and frontperson.

members.name: Cedric Walker
members.note: Sibling. Heavy, propulsive. Blues shuffle at punk velocity. Communication since birth.

theory_nodes.concept: First Blues Rock -- Genre Stage 107. The oldest rock genre lineage enters at degree 206. The engine mirrors Seattle's relationship with blues: always filtered, never purist.
examples: Blues rock: root of all rock music.
Seattle is not a blues city. Blues here is filtered through punk and indie.
The oldest lineage, the newest entry.
theory_nodes.description: First Blues Rock. Genre Stage 107. Oldest tradition, newest entry.

genealogy.relationship: The Black Tones at 206. First Blues Rock in engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Rainier Valley enters the engine -- south Seattle's diverse heart. Not Capitol Hill. Black cultural tradition plus punk energy plus indie aesthetics. A different part of the city.
examples: Rainier Valley: MLK Jr. Way South corridor.
One of America's most diverse neighborhoods.
Most engine entries from Capitol Hill or U-District.
South Seattle brings a different cultural context.
theory_nodes.description: Rainier Valley enters. South Seattle. Diverse heart. Not Capitol Hill.

genealogy.relationship: The Black Tones at 206. Rainier Valley enters the engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Sibling duo format -- two people making blues rock. More economical than power trio (205). Maximum pressure on each member. Sibling shorthand: communication since birth.
examples: Eva Walker: guitar/vocals. Cedric Walker: drums.
Sibling shorthand -- no rehearsal needed for timing.
Even more economical than Naked Giants' trio (205).
Formations shrink: quartet to trio to duo.
theory_nodes.description: Sibling duo. Two people, one blues rock band. Maximum economy.

genealogy.relationship: The Black Tones at 206. Sibling duo enters engine.

cross_references.relationship: Previous entry. Power trio to sibling duo. Three to two. Both Sub Pop. Both E=6. Formations shrink.
Four consecutive E=6 (203-206). Pop-punk, garage-raw, power trio, blues rock. Longest E=6 streak.
Sub Pop lineage. Quiet indie (E=4) vs. loud blues (E=6). The label's range.
EXTREME CONTRAST (E=6 + E=2). Ancient lineage: blues (oldest genre) and Mountain Beaver (oldest rodent). Both PNW.
